sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, hex_value VARCHAR(100), num_value DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, hex_value, num_value) VALUES (1, 'abcd', 8.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, hex_value, num_value) VALUES (2, '0', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, hex_value, num_value) VALUES (3, NULL, 27.0);
SELECT id, cbrt(CAST(blob hex_value AS double)) AS cube_root FROM test_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cbrt(num_value) AS cube_root FROM test_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL AND cbrt(num_value) > 1.5;
SELECT id, num_value, cbrt(CAST(blob hex_value AS double)) AS computed_value FROM test_data WHERE CAST(blob hex_value AS double) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, cbrt(CAST(blob hex_value AS double)) FROM test_data GROUP BY cbrt(CAST(blob hex_value AS double)) HAVING count > 1;
CREATE TABLE extra_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(20));
SELECT e.id, cbrt(CAST(b.hex_value AS double)) FROM test_data AS t JOIN extra_data AS e ON e.id = t.id WHERE e.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.id, cbrt(CAST(blob e.value AS double)) AS cube_root_value FROM extra_data e WHERE CAST(blob e.value AS double) IS NULL;
SELECT id, num_value, cbrt(num_value) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY id) AS windowed_cbrt FROM test_data;
SELECT id, cbrt(NULLIF(num_value, 0)) AS safe_cbrt FROM test_data WHERE hex_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.id, cbrt(cbrt(CAST(blob e.value AS double))) FROM extra_data e WHERE CAST(blob e.value AS double) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cbrt(num_value) FROM test_data WHERE NOT (num_value > 100 OR num_value IS NULL) ORDER BY cbrt(num_value) DESC;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test_data AS SELECT id, cbrt(num_value) AS temp_cbrt FROM test_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
